purpose: Report-only guardrail policy for determining whether a future WellFit pull request would be eligible for automatic merge consideration. This policy never authorizes or performs a merge by itself.

pr_creation_allowed.meaningWhenActivated: An agent may create a reviewable pull request for allowed docs/register/validator/governance work only.
pr_creation_allowed.activationRequirement: A later explicit policy activation may make this the first meaningful next state; defining it here does not grant the current runner PR-creation authority.

requiredEvidence: all required local checks passed with exact command/result evidence
machine-readable GitHub required checks are present and successful
branch protection and review-rule evidence are satisfied
PR is mergeable against the base branch
PR diff review reports no runtime/protected path findings
merge_recommendation_allowed.meaningWhenActivated: An agent may recommend merge only when full machine-readable local and GitHub evidence is green.
merge_recommendation_allowed.activationRequirement: May activate only after pr_creation_allowed is active and full machine-readable local/GitHub evidence, branch protection, review rules, and mergeability evidence are proven.

auto_merge_allowed.meaningWhenActivated: Real auto-merge remains disabled until a separate explicit human approval enables it after machine-readable GitHub checks, branch protection, review rules, mergeability evidence, and human approval are proven.

separationRules: PR creation is not merge permission.
Missing, pending, skipped, unknown, failed, or environment-blocked checks block merge recommendation and auto-merge.

Runtime, protected, product, Unity, deployment, package, Firebase, GitHub workflow, token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting/reward-authority/mission-authority/health/child/location/camera/biometric/consent/privacy/legal/compliance changes remain blocked.

humanApprovalAlwaysRequiredFor: any package.json or package-lock.json change without explicit approval
any app, component, lib, function, Firestore rules, or Unity/WellFitBuddyAR change
token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward authority, mission completion authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity, or PR #13 topics
failed, missing, skipped, or unknown required checks
more changed files, additions, or deletions than the configured maximum

stages.permission: Analyse, dry-runs, reports, eligibility decisions and governance validation only; no file writes except generated reports explicitly owned by the invoked checker.
mustNot: create pull requests from a runner

stages.permission: One agent may execute exactly one approved low-risk docs/register/check-script task per branch within allowed governance paths.
mustNot: auto-repair beyond explicitly requested task scope
requiredEvidence: json validation for changed policy/register files

stages.permission: One agent may modify only runtime files explicitly allowlisted by a separate human approval for a concrete task.
mustNot: touch protected compliance/economy/health/child/location/camera/Unity/PR #13 areas unless separately approved with review plan
requiredEvidence: separate human approval naming exact runtime files

stages.permission: Only narrowly defined repairs from the auto-repair policy may be attempted after failed evidence checks.
mayChange: files already within the approved task scope and safe repair categories
requiredEvidence: rerun failed and full required checks

stages.permission: Auto-merge may be considered only after complete local check evidence, successful required GitHub checks, mergeability, PR diff review, auto-repair decision, and human review evidence required by policy.
mustNot: merge protected/runtime-risk changes without explicit review evidence

currentRelease.scope: Only one-agent docs/register/check-script governance execution is activated for approved low-risk tasks. Runtime execution, auto-repair, auto-merge and deploy remain disabled unless their own policy activationState is explicitly raised in a later human-approved change.

activationDecision.reason: Align the runner policy set to the staged autonomy model requested on 2026-05-17.
activationDecision.effectiveScope: Report-only guard remains in force for this policy.

governanceProtectedTopicWordingPolicy.meaning: AUTO_MERGE_ELIGIBLE=false is an acceptable safe report-only result for governance/documentation diffs that mention protected-topic words only as boundaries.
